name: When You're at Sea You Fight against Pirates!!

issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) 'count' parameter specifying 'look at 3 cards', (2) 'filter' should specify the three allowed types: {Straw Hat Crew}, {Kid Pirates}, {Heart Pirates}, not 'Any', (3) action sequence missing the 'place rest at bottom' reordering mechanic
DSL does not capture the full effect: looking at 3 cards, revealing up to 1 matching card to hand, and placing remaining cards at bottom in any order. Current DSL only models the search portion
